title: Smoke test: opt-in dispatch verification
body:
## Opened With

Smoke test for the Spider opt-in dispatch refactor (commit 70988c1). Before this change, quest writs would be grabbed by the default-template catch-all and dispatched to a rig, failing fast with "Writ has no codex — cannot open a draft binding." After this change, quest writs should remain inert because `quest` has no entry in `rigTemplateMappings`.

## Summary

**PASSED.** Quest was posted, landed in `ready`, and Spider's crawl loop correctly skipped it — no rig spawned, no status transition, `updatedAt === createdAt` after a crawl cycle had elapsed. Opt-in dispatch is working as designed: unmapped writ types (like `quest`) are inert to Spider. Concluding.

## Notes

- 2026-04-10: posted as smoke test for opt-in dispatch refactor
- 2026-04-10: verified status stayed `ready` after crawl cycle; no rig spawned; smoke test passed; concluding
resolution: Smoke test complete: opt-in dispatch verified. Quest writ stayed in ready; Spider did not spawn a rig.
